ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_type" TEXT /* Type of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract where the population data is from */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "total_population_margin_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the total population */,
  "non_hispanic_white_population" INTEGER /* Non-Hispanic white population */,
  "non_hispanic_white_population_margin_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the non-Hispanic white population */,
  "population_year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was collected */,
  "population_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract where the race data is from */,
  "black_or_african_american_population" INTEGER /* Black or African American population */,
  "black_or_african_american_population_margin_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the black or African American population */,
  "american_indian_and_alaska_native_population" INTEGER /* American Indian and Alaska Native population */,
  "american_indian_and_alaska_native_population_margin_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the American Indian and Alaska Native population */,
  "race_year" INTEGER /* Year the race data was collected */,
  "race_source" TEXT /* Source of the race data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentages" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract where the percentage data is from */,
  "percent_non_hispanic_white" REAL /* Percent of the population that is non-Hispanic white */,
  "percent_non_hispanic_white_margin_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the percent non-Hispanic white */,
  "percent_black_or_african_american" REAL /* Percent of the population that is black or African American */,
  "percent_black_or_african_american_margin_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the percent black or African American */,
  "percentage_year" INTEGER /* Year the percentage data was collected */,
  "percentage_source" TEXT /* Source of the percentage data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract where the coordinate data is from */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the census tract's centroid */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the census tract's centroid */,
  "coordinate_system" TEXT /* Coordinate system used for the coordinates */,
  "coordinate_source" TEXT /* Source of the coordinate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)
